sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 11.47 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.11)

statement.latex: Let${ L}_d$be the homogeneous component of degree$d$in a free Lie algebra${ L}$of rank 2 over the field of order 2. What is the dimension of the fixed point space in${ L}_d$for the automorphism of${ L}$which interchanges two elements of a free generating set of${ L}$? { L.\,G.\,Kov\'acs} It is found; R.\,M.\,Bryant and R.\,St\"ohr (Arch. Math., { 67}, no.\,4 (1996), 281--289) confirmed the conject...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
